description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with a low, angular profile and a long, protruding cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The exterior is covered in a digital camouflage pattern composed of green, brown, and beige tones, designed to break up its outline. The hull features thick, sloped armor plating on all visible sides, with additional reinforced sections along the lower body and turret. The vehicle rides on continuous tracks, which are partially shielded by side skirts for added protection. No visible windows or hatches are present, emphasizing its focus on protection and combat readiness. The overall design suggests a modern main battle tank optimized for urban and open terrain operations.
description: A modern, heavily armored combat vehicle with a long cannon, digital camouflage, and continuous tracks, designed for tactical operations. Its angular, reinforced hull and turret emphasize protection and firepower.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon, the angular turret, and the continuous tracks with side skirts.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped frontal armor, narrow profile, and the cannon barrel extending directly forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the turret, cannon, and the vehicle's compact, armored body with visible track protection.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the turret, rear armor plating, and the ends of the tracks.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret; no other visible weapon mounts or hardpoints.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; reinforced side skirts over the tracks.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern in green, brown, and beige with rectangular and pixelated shapes.
